headline: TD Cowen Maintains Hold on Cognizant Tech Solns, Lowers Price Target to $71
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Bryan C. Bergin   maintains Cognizant Tech Solns (NASDAQ:CTSH) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $85 to $71.
